description: [UNVERIFIED — authored from official API docs; test with your API key before signing] GitLab REST API (v4) via a Personal Access Token — search projects, review merge requests, and track issues and pipelines. For self-managed GitLab, change the host and baseUrl to your instance.

credentialFields.name: personalAccessToken
credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token
credentialFields.description: Create at https://gitlab.com/-/user_settings/personal_access_tokens. Scopes: read_api (or api for write actions like adding MR notes). Sent as 'Authorization: Bearer <token>'.

tools.name: gitlab_get_current_user
tools.description: Get the authenticated user (id, username, name, email).

tools.name: gitlab_search_projects
tools.description: Search projects you can access by name or path.

params.name: search
params.description: Search term matched against project name and path.

params.name: membership
params.description: Limit to projects you are a member of.

tools.name: gitlab_get_project
tools.description: Get project metadata by id. The id is the numeric project id, or the URL-encoded full path namespace%2Fname (e.g. mygroup%2Fmyrepo).

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname' (e.g. gitlab-org%2Fgitlab).

tools.name: gitlab_list_my_issues
tools.description: List issues assigned to you across all projects.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: search
params.description: Search issues against their title and description.

tools.name: gitlab_list_merge_requests
tools.description: List merge requests in a project.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: target_branch
params.description: Filter by target branch name.

tools.name: gitlab_get_merge_request
tools.description: Get a merge request by its project-scoped internal id (iid).

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: merge_request_iid
params.description: Project-scoped MR internal id (the !N number shown in the UI).

tools.name: gitlab_get_merge_request_changes
tools.description: Get the diff/changes of a merge request (changed files with diffs).

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: merge_request_iid
params.description: Project-scoped MR internal id (the !N number shown in the UI).

tools.name: gitlab_list_merge_request_notes
tools.description: List the discussion notes (comments) on a merge request.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: merge_request_iid
params.description: Project-scoped MR internal id.

tools.name: gitlab_list_pipelines
tools.description: List CI/CD pipelines for a project.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: ref
params.description: Filter by branch or tag name.

tools.name: gitlab_get_file
tools.description: Get a file's contents from a project repository. Returns base64-encoded content in the 'content' field; decode to read it.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: file_path
params.description: URL-encoded file path, e.g. src%2Findex.ts

params.name: ref
params.description: Branch, tag, or commit SHA (e.g. main).

tools.name: gitlab_add_merge_request_note
tools.description: Post a comment (note) on a merge request.

params.name: id
params.description: Numeric project id, or URL-encoded full path 'namespace%2Fname'.

params.name: merge_request_iid
params.description: Project-scoped MR internal id.

params.name: note
params.description: { "body": "comment text" }
